Alright guys, welcome to the final theme plate of module three. So this is just going to be a small twist of the theme plate we explored earlier, except that milestone moment that we're reconfirming is the webinar registration. So even though someone registered for your webinar, it's super crucial to recognize and realize that it does not guarantee a show up. And while it does vary across industry, you'd usually be happy and lucky if 25% of your signups show up live, which is kind of problematic when you think about it. Now you're getting those leads sometimes from Facebook traffic that you're paying for. So why would you pay for someone to register for a webinar if you weren't willing to invest a little bit of an extra effort to sell the show up coach the show up since that is going to be so critical and essential for the final conversion. So this theme plate is all about two things selling the show up and pre framing the sale.
